516 PAIN_SLP_ADMSN_CD PAIN_SLP_ADMSN_CD Pain effect on sleep (Adm) CHAR 1 This column document, at the time of admission, how often, in the past five days, has pain made it hard to sleep at night. 0 = Does not apply - I have not had any pain or hurting in the past 5 days 
1 = Rarely or not at all 
2 = Occasionally 
3 = Frequently 
4 = Almost constantly 
8 = Unable to
